scuff.name: Scuff
quips: If you don't, Pinky will change the settings on your all ceiling fans!
If you don't, Pinky will overtighten all the lids in your kitchen!
If you don't, Pinky will release a male cricket into every room of your house!
If you don't, Pinky will scramble your silverware drawer!
If you don't, Pinky will spoil the next chapter of One Piece!
If you don't, Pinky will steal all your left socks!
If you don't, Pinky will turn all your picture frames upside down!
